evidence.notes: Session E refinement: Escape key does NOT close the popover via the renderer's onkeydown=HandleEscape handler. The Blazor onkeydown event does not propagate from inside the FluentPopover web-component boundary to the Blazor handler. The Cancel button (which calls ClosePopoverAsync directly) does close the popover, so the close path itself is sound; only the Escape wiring is gapped. Tracked in deferred-work.md.

domSelectors: Type 5 in popover Amount field, click Increment submit button — submit fires (Blazor click handler invoked)
evidence.notes: Session E observation: Form submit dispatches SubmittedAction (verified earlier in bUnit Renderer_OneField_PopoverSubmit_InnerFormDispatchesSubmittedAction). However the popover does NOT auto-close on Confirmed — fluent-popover-b stays opened='true' after submit. The renderer's OnConfirmedAsync calls ClosePopoverAsync, but the Form's OnConfirmed callback may not fire on the Counter sample lifecycle path. Tracked in deferred-work.md as a Counter-sample auto-close wiring follow-up. (Prior session marked this 'skipped' citing headless flakiness; the real issue is the auto-close wiring.)
